Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mason]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Masons rely on disguises for their work.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Masons are part of the group that cleans up after battles alongside Shepherds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — A Mason is a character who works for the Greenwardens and was training Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Masons can go undercover in various uniforms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Masons are members of a Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — A Mason mounted a Waverider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — A Mason hauled Shera onto the back of a Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — A Mason was undercover in the Navigator’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The team includes fourteen combat-trained Masons and twelve sailor Masons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Masons are a group that includes trainees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — There are Mason servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — A Mason wore an apron.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Masons are a group that includes guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Masons are a group of people armed with guns.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — A Palace maid, who is a Mason, left a ladder down for Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Mason led the way through the hallway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — A stranger was identified as a Mason by his lack of a black uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — A Mason attempted to attack Shera.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
